untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'news event announcement' and 'material directional content' which are external market events, not calculable from OHLCV data. Also requires 'estimated fair-value gap' calculation (90%+ threshold) which depends on fundamental valuation models not available in the indicator set. The core 'conservatism bias' / price underreaction mechanism cannot be reliably quantified from technical indicators alone without external news/sentiment data.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Used small returns (< 3.5% in direction) combined with elevated implied volatility (hvol_20 spike) to approximate 'minimal initial market reaction despite IV spike'. Exit set to 3% in favorable direction (90%+ gap approximation). However, without explicit news events and fair-value estimates, this is a heuristic approximation only. The signal is fundamentally untranslatable without external data feeds.
